summary: Comprehensive testing of CaseDesk AI proactive features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: KI-Assistent tab, AI document suggestions API, daily briefing API, theme toggle, and user invitation. AI endpoints work correctly but return expected 'AI unavailable' error since Ollama/OpenAI is not configured.

design_issues.issue: When AI is unavailable, the KI-Tagesbriefing section doesn't show any UI element. It should show an error/unavailable state instead of being completely hidden.
design_issues.details: Dashboard.js only shows briefing if response.data.success is true. Should show an 'AI unavailable' message when briefing fails.

design_issues.issue: Similarly, when AI suggestions fail (because AI is unavailable), no UI feedback is shown in the case creation dialog.
design_issues.details: Cases.js only shows suggestions section if loadingSuggestions || suggestions is truthy. Should show 'AI unavailable' when suggestions fail.

passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/ai/suggest-documents accepts case_title and returns response (success:false with AI unavailable - expected)
Backend API: GET /api/cases/{id}/proactive-analysis returns analysis object (success:false with AI unavailable - expected)
Backend API: GET /api/ai/daily-briefing returns briefing object (success:false with AI unavailable - expected)
Dashboard loads with stats (1 case, 1 document, 0 tasks)
Case Detail page has 'KI-Assistent' tab as the FIRST tab (order: KI-Assistent, Dokumente, Korrespondenz, Verlauf)
Case Detail KI-Assistent tab shows 'KI-Analyse nicht verfügbar' with 'Analyse starten' button
Case creation dialog opens with Title, Description, Reference Number, Status fields
Theme toggle in sidebar works - switches between dark/light mode
Settings page has multiple tabs: User Preferences, E-Mail, Benutzer, AI Configuration, Privacy, Export
Settings > Benutzer tab shows active users (1) and pending invitations (3)
Settings > Benutzer tab has 'Benutzer einladen' button
User invite dialog shows E-Mail input, Role dropdown, and Einladen button
Backend auth/me endpoint returns user info
Backend AI status shows Ollama: unavailable, OpenAI: unavailable (expected)
action_items: LOW: Consider showing 'KI-Briefing nicht verfügbar' on Dashboard when AI fails instead of showing nothing
LOW: Consider showing 'KI nicht verfügbar' in case creation dialog when AI suggestions fail
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js (lines 46-57): loadDailyBriefing only sets briefing state on success. Should handle error case to show user feedback.
Cases.js (lines 76-89): loadSuggestions only sets suggestions on success. Could improve UX by showing 'AI unavailable' when it fails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proactive AI features fully implemented: POST /api/ai/suggest-documents, GET /api/cases/{id}/proactive-analysis, GET /api/ai/daily-briefing. All endpoints work correctly but return AI unavailable errors since neither Ollama nor OpenAI is configured. Frontend handles AI unavailable gracefully in CaseDetail.js (shows 'KI-Analyse nicht verfügbar' with button to retry). Dashboard and Case creation dialog could improve by showing error state instead of hiding AI sections when unavailable.

login_auth.details: Login with admin@casedesk.app / admin123 works correctly

dashboard_ki_briefing.details: API exists and returns expected response. UI doesn't show when AI unavailable (design improvement needed)

case_detail_ki_assistent_tab.details: KI-Assistent is the first tab. Shows 'KI-Analyse nicht verfügbar' with 'Analyse starten' button when AI unavailable

case_creation_ai_suggestions.details: API POST /api/ai/suggest-documents works. UI triggers after 1.5s delay but shows nothing when AI unavailable

theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle in sidebar switches between dark/light mode correctly

settings_benutzer_tab.details: Shows active users, pending invitations, and 'Benutzer einladen' button. Invite dialog has email input and role selection

ai_service_status.note: AI features return 'success: false' because neither Ollama nor OpenAI is configured. This is EXPECTED per the testing requirements.
